title: moraea tricuspis
intro: Moraea tricuspis, also known as the Red or Yellow Corn Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Moraea tricuspis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of Moraea tricuspis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
